sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Real Sociedad have struggled recently, with only 1 win in their last 5 matches, showing inconsistency in attack and defense. Rayo Vallecano are in similar poor form, also with just 1 win in their last 5, often failing to convert chances despite decent possession stats.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, games have been competitive with both teams scoring (3-1 to Real Sociedad at home and a 2-2 draw away). Matches tend to see over 2.5 goals and a high number of cards, indicating tight and physical encounters.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Real Sociedad rank higher in creating chances (top in corners per game, good penalty area entries) but struggle with conversion (25% big chances converted). Rayo Vallecano have similar offensive output but are slightly better defensively in recent games, though both teams are in the bottom half of the league table.

sections.subtitle: Key Trends
sections.text: Both teams often see games with goals from both sides, as indicated by recent streaks. Real Sociedad's home advantage at Reale Arena and higher corner count could play a role, while Rayo Vallecano's resilience in tight matches might keep the score close.

halftimeSections.subtitle: First half overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half between Real Sociedad and Rayo Vallecano at Reale Arena ended in a goalless draw. Both teams showed moments of promise but failed to convert their chances into goals. Real Sociedad held a slight edge in possession and looked more comfortable in the final third, making more entries into the penalty area. Rayo Vallecano, on the other hand, struggled to create significant threats despite having a balanced share of the ball. Neither side managed to dominate for extended periods, resulting in a cautious and evenly matched half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attacking momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: The game started with Rayo Vallecano pushing forward early, showing intent in the opening minutes with several attacking spells. However, the momentum shifted around the midway point of the half as Real Sociedad began to assert themselves, enjoying a prolonged period of pressure with consistent forays into the attacking third. Towards the latter stages, Real Sociedad maintained their dominance with frequent surges forward, while Rayo Vallecano had occasional bursts but couldn’t sustain their early energy. This shift suggests Real Sociedad found their rhythm as the half progressed.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance breakdown
halftimeSections.text: Real Sociedad demonstrated greater control in the final third, with more entries and penetrative moves into the penalty area compared to Rayo Vallecano. Their ability to win duels, especially on the ground, gave them an edge in maintaining possession and building attacks. Rayo Vallecano, despite matching their opponents in some defensive metrics, lacked the same incisiveness going forward. Their lower duel success rate indicates they struggled to impose themselves physically, which limited their attacking output. Both teams earned an equal number of corners, but neither capitalized on set-piece opportunities.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key players to watch
halftimeSections.text: For Real Sociedad, Mikel Oyarzabal showed promise in the attacking third with a notable presence in dangerous areas, making him a potential game-changer in the second half. Brais Méndez also stood out with composed play and could be instrumental in unlocking Rayo’s defense. On the Rayo Vallecano side, Jorge de Frutos appeared as their most likely threat based on his involvement in forward moves. Florian Lejeune was solid at the back and could play a role in both defensive stability and set-piece situations.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: Given the first-half dynamics, Real Sociedad are likely to come out stronger in the second half, leveraging their growing confidence in attack. They may focus on exploiting the flanks and increasing the tempo to break down Rayo Vallecano’s defense. Rayo Vallecano will need to improve their duel-winning ability and look for counter-attacking opportunities to turn the tide. A tactical adjustment from Rayo could see them tighten up defensively while seeking quick transitions. The second half could see a breakthrough, especially if Real Sociedad maintain their momentum.
